diffs.diff:
--- a/model.py
+++ b/model.py
@@ -62,36 +62,40 @@
         return self.conv(x)

 

 class AttentionBlock(nn.Module):

-    def __init__(self, in_channels):

+    def __init__(self, in_channels, num_heads=8):

         super().__init__()

         self.norm = nn.GroupNorm(32, in_channels)

         self.qkv = nn.Conv2d(in_channels, in_channels * 3, kernel_size=1)

         self.proj = nn.Conv2d(in_channels, in_channels, kernel_size=1)

+        self.num_heads = num_heads

 

     def forward(self, x):

         B, C, H, W = x.shape

         qkv = self.qkv(self.norm(x))

         q, k, v = qkv.chunk(3, dim=1)

         

-        q = q.view(B, C, -1).transpose(1, 2) # B, N, C

-        k = k.view(B, C, -1) # B, C, N

-        v = v.view(B, C, -1).transpose(1, 2) # B, N, C

+        head_dim = C // self.num_heads

         

-        attn = (q @ k) * (C ** -0.5)

+        q = q.view(B, self.num_heads, head_dim, -1).transpose(-2, -1) # B, H, N, D

+        k = k.view(B, self.num_heads, head_dim, -1) # B, H, D, N

+        v = v.view(B, self.num_heads, head_dim, -1).transpose(-2, -1) # B, H, N, D

+        

+        attn = (q @ k) * (head_dim ** -0.5)

         attn = F.softmax(attn, dim=-1)

         

-        out = (attn @ v).transpose(1, 2).view(B, C, H, W)

+        out = (attn @ v).transpose(-2, -1).reshape(B, C, H, W)

         return x + self.proj(out)

 

 class WeatherUNet(nn.Module):

-    def __init__(self, in_channels=9, out_channels=2, base_dim=192, dropout=0.1):

+    def __init__(self, in_channels=9, out_channels=2, base_dim=256, dropout=0.2):

         super().__init__()

         self.inc = DoubleConv(in_channels, base_dim, dropout=dropout)

         self.down1 = Down(base_dim, base_dim*2, dropout=dropout)

         self.down2 = Down(base_dim*2, base_dim*4, dropout=dropout)

         self.down3 = Down(base_dim*4, base_dim*8, dropout=dropout)

         

-        self.attn = AttentionBlock(base_dim*8)

+        self.attn1 = AttentionBlock(base_dim*4, num_heads=8)

+        self.attn2 = AttentionBlock(base_dim*8, num_heads=8)

         

         self.up1 = Up(base_dim*8, base_dim*4, dropout=dropout)

         self.up2 = Up(base_dim*4, base_dim*2, dropout=dropout)

@@ -111,9 +115,9 @@
         x1 = self.inc(x_flat)

         x2 = self.down1(x1)

         x3 = self.down2(x2)

+        x3 = self.attn1(x3)

         x4 = self.down3(x3)

-        

-        x4 = self.attn(x4)

+        x4 = self.attn2(x4)

         

         x_up = self.up1(x4, x3)

         x_up = self.up2(x_up, x2)
